Home.hero_desc: We focus on the 20% of processes and risks that cause 80% of failures, cost overruns, and rework in energy projects.
Home.roi_3_label: in reducing the Cost of Poor Quality (CoPQ).
Home.capex_desc: Simulate how the lack of controls impacts the final cost of your project.
Home.service_1_desc: Focused on preventing critical failures before they turn into incidents or cost overruns.
Home.service_2_desc: Technical audits for transmission systems and datacenters revealing critical operational risks.
Home.service_3_desc: Focused on critical processes impacting reliability and operational performance.
Home.service_4_desc: We identify the real source of failures and incidents in energy operations and projects.
Home.eco_1_desc: Energy sector experts who know exactly where to look for faults.
Home.eco_2_desc: Georeferenced and offline capture. The end of Excel rework.
Home.eco_3_desc: C-Level visibility. If there is a critical risk, you know it before the day ends.
Home.solutions_desc: Customized engagement models designed to integrate with your corporate operations.
Home.solution_1_desc: We analyze operational risks and actual controls impacting business security and continuity.
Home.solution_2_desc: We identify the critical 20% processes causing 80% of problems through KPIs and risk analysis.

Nosotros.hero_desc: We were born to transform technical consulting in the energy sector, applying the Pareto principle to protect the profitability of your projects.
Nosotros.hacemos_p1: At Ochenta Veinte we don't just review standards; we optimize critical processes to ensure every dollar of your CAPEX is protected. Our methodology identifies risks that others ignore, delivering results in real time.
Nosotros.hacemos_p2: "We are not inspectors; we are the firewall of your CAPEX. We combine senior technical rigor with proprietary technology to turn compliance into a competitive cash flow advantage."
Nosotros.mision_desc: To provide "Operational Certainty" through a technical-financial approach. We don't just audit standards; we identify capital leaks in the CAPEX/OPEX of Colombian energy infrastructure.
Nosotros.vision_desc: To be the leading disruptive consulting firm in Latin America, recognized for digitizing quality and regulatory compliance through proprietary technology and agile operational structures.
Nosotros.feature_1_desc: We don't waste time on irrelevant details. We identify the 20% of critical causes that impact 80% of your profitability.
Nosotros.feature_2_desc: While the competition takes weeks to deliver a static PDF, we deliver digital certainties in record time.
Nosotros.feature_3_desc: Our audits aren't just for compliance; they are financial tools to prevent capital leaks and fines.
Nosotros.feature_4_desc: Real-time data visualization. Make strategic decisions based on facts, not assumptions.
Nosotros.equipo_desc: We combine high-level industrial engineering with digital product design to create solutions that traditional large firms cannot offer.
Nosotros.member_1_bio: Management systems specialist with over 10 years of international experience. Has led critical audits in power transmission and generation projects.
Nosotros.member_2_bio: Expert in Vibe Coding and Branding. In charge of transforming complex technical processes into intuitive dashboards and high-speed digital tools.

Contacto.title: Contact
Contacto.desc: Ready to mitigate risks and protect your CAPEX? Our technical team is available for an initial strategic consultation.
Contacto.section_desc: We use direct channels to ensure responses in less than 24 business hours.
Contacto.success_desc: Our team is reviewing your request. We will reply shortly.
Contacto.placeholder_message: Briefly describe the project or quality challenge...

Auditorias.title: Internal & <blue>Supplier</blue> Audits
Auditorias.desc: We don't do audits just to tick a box. We execute high-impact technical inspections designed to protect capital and ensure operational certainty in energy projects.
Auditorias.f1_desc: Results in less than 72 hours to identify critical risks affecting the operating margin.
Auditorias.f2_desc: Technical evaluation of the supply chain to ensure compliance with the contracted CAPEX.
Auditorias.f3_desc: Real-time visualization of non-conformities with direct financial impact.
Auditorias.enfoque_item_1: Field data capture with Vibe Coding for immediate reporting.
Auditorias.enfoque_item_2: Identification of the 20% of risks causing 80% of cost overruns.
Auditorias.enfoque_item_3: Technical validation by experts with over 10 years of experience.
Auditorias.enfoque_item_4: Cloud synchronization for decisions before the day ends.
Auditorias.promesa_desc: "While the competition takes 15 days to deliver a PDF, we enable your results dashboard in less than 72 hours."

MejoraContinua.title: Profitability & <blue>Operational Control</blue>
MejoraContinua.desc: We target the 20% of critical variables that impact 80% of your profitability. We don't just manage standards; we shield your capital against the Cost of Non-Quality (CoNQ).
MejoraContinua.f1_desc: High-level technical support to ensure your system is a engine of efficiency.
MejoraContinua.f2_desc: Proactive identification of critical deviations before they affect the budget.
MejoraContinua.f3_desc: Dashboards that eliminate noise and display only indicators impacting the operation.
MejoraContinua.f4_desc: We optimize key processes so the system evolves at the speed of your business.
MejoraContinua.pareto_item_1: Diagnosis of technical and financial bottlenecks.
MejoraContinua.pareto_item_4: Direct access to experts to mitigate risks in real-time.
MejoraContinua.suscripcion_desc: "Total technical peace of mind: your system works while you scale the business. Identification of financial leaks before they become irreversible."
